message:
fix(frankenpandas): add error types and NullKind/Column to facade API

The facade crate was missing error types, forcing users to import
internal crates for error handling. Added re-exports:
- IoError (fp-io)
- ColumnError (fp-columnar)
- IndexError (fp-index)
- ExprError (fp-expr)
- JoinError (fp-join)
- FrameError was already exported

Also added NullKind and Column to the prelude - both are needed
for basic DataFrame construction (e.g., creating Null/NaN scalars,
building columns from value vectors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
